# Cache - visual source note
## Five-player default overlay sources

- **T overlay:** default-t.svg embeds assets/cache-callouts.webp as the sourced map-photo layer and adds local annotations for five roles, spawn-based routes, and initial pressure.
- **CT overlay:** default-ct.svg embeds the same sourced map-photo layer and adds local annotations for five roles, hold angles, and the first rotation trigger.
- **Local map-photo layer:** assets/cache-callouts.webp (copied into each built map page so the article and GitHub file preview retain the photo behind the overlay).
- **Overlay background URL:** https://www.csgold.net/maps/cache-callouts.webp
- **Source page:** https://www.csgold.net/en/maps/cache
- **Checked:** 2026-07-15
- **Attribution/license or permission basis:** Source map remains attributed to CSGold; this local copy is included for the review build at the user's direction. The annotations are hand-authored editorial overlays.
- **Map-version note:** Re-check the background callouts and route relationships if the installed map geometry changes.
- **Replacement trigger:** Replace both overlays and this record when the verified map geometry, callouts, source URL, or tactical role relationships change.

- **Map source:** https://www.hotspawn.com/counter-strike/guide/cs2-cache-callouts
- **Official return note:** https://www.counter-strike.net/newsentry/508486359454843045
- **Checked:** 2026-07-13
- **Map-version note:** The released 2026 CS2 Cache three-lane layout and callouts were checked against the current callout page and Valve's 2026 return note.
- **Asset type:** Local sourced callout photo plus local hand-authored route teaching diagram.
- **Attribution/license or permission basis:** CSGold remains attributed as the source; this review build stores the callout photo locally at the user's direction.
- **Local annotated asset status:** Complete for `default-t.svg` and `default-ct.svg`; these hand-authored overlays preserve the sourced map photo behind the routes.
- **Overlay source page:** https://www.hotspawn.com/counter-strike/guide/cs2-cache-callouts
- **Overlay source checked:** 2026-07-13
- **Overlay attribution/license or permission basis:** Route annotations are hand-authored by this repository; the sourced photo is separately stored as the map layer.
- **Status:** Keep the sourced map photo and hand-authored route diagram local for this review build.
- **Replacement trigger:** Replace the source note and SVG when verified Cache geometry, callouts, route connections, or utility interactions change.

## Utility screenshot sources

- **Target:** `T molly Forklift`
  - **Source page title:** Cache Molotov Forklift from A Main
  - **Source page URL:** https://csnades.gg/cache/molotovs/forklift-from-a-main
  - **Referenced lineup:** `Forklift from A Main`
  - **Direct asset URL:** Not identified; retain the source-page URL.
  - **Screenshot availability:** A remote video lineup provides the start, aim, input, and result; no local screenshot is stored.
  - **Checked:** 2026-07-13
  - **Map-version note:** Published 2026-05-17 for the returned CS2 Cache; re-check after any A-site or grenade-clipping update.
  - **Local reuse permitted:** Not verified.
  - **Status:** Remote source - not stored locally.
  - **Attribution/license or permission basis:** No local copy was made because explicit reuse permission was not verified.
  - **Replacement trigger:** Replace when the verified Forklift lineup or a permitted source changes.

- **Target:** `T smoke Heaven for B`

  - **Direct asset URL:** Not identified; retain the source-page URL.
  - **Screenshot availability:** The remote page links the lineup video and documents the B Heaven result; no local screenshot is stored.
  - **Checked:** 2026-07-13
  - **Map-version note:** Re-check the roof-gap throw and Heaven/Rafters coverage against the installed Cache version before match use.
  - **Local reuse permitted:** Not verified.
  - **Status:** Remote source - not stored locally.
  - **Attribution/license or permission basis:** No local copy was made because explicit reuse permission was not verified.
  - **Replacement trigger:** Replace when the verified B Heaven lineup or a permitted source changes.

- **Target:** `CT smoke B Main on retake`
  - **Source page title:** Best Cache Smokes in CS2
  - **Source page URL:** https://profilerr.net/cache-smokes-in-cs2/
  - **Referenced section:** `B Heaven to B Main (Deep)`
  - **Direct asset URL:** Not identified; retain the source-page URL.
  - **Screenshot availability:** The remote page links the lineup video and describes its retake use; no local screenshot is stored.
  - **Checked:** 2026-07-13
  - **Map-version note:** Re-check the B Heaven corner and deep B Main coverage against the installed Cache version before match use.
  - **Local reuse permitted:** Not verified.
  - **Status:** Remote source - not stored locally.
  - **Attribution/license or permission basis:** No local copy was made because explicit reuse permission was not verified.
  - **Replacement trigger:** Replace when the verified B Main retake smoke or a permitted source changes.

Every future local utility image must record its source page, direct asset URL when different, checked date, map-version note, status, replacement trigger, and attribution/license or permission basis.
